utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hey , look at me . I am making jam , been at it since 4 o clock this morning .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Where would you get fruit at four in the morning ?

emotion_cause.span: 2_you get fruit at four in the morning

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Went down to the docks . Bet you did not know you could get it wholesale .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I did not know there were docks .

emotion_cause.span: 4_I did not know there were docks .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Aww , is it broken ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: No , I gotta wear this thing for a couple weeks .

emotion_cause.span: 7_I gotta wear this thing for a couple weeks .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Did you tell the doctor you did it jumping up and down on your bed ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Nooo . I had a story all worked out but then Chandler sold me out .

emotion_cause.span: 9_I had a story all worked out but then Chandler sold me out .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , I am sorry Joe . I did not think the doctor was gonna buy that it just " fell out of the socket " .

emotion_cause.span: 10_I did not think the doctor was gonna buy that it just " fell out of the socket " .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: What is this ? Fruit ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Monica making jam .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Whoa , jam ! I love jam ! Hey , how come we never have jam at our place ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Because the kids need new shoes .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I am going into business people .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I am sick and tired of being depressed about Richard .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I needed a plan , a plan to get over my man .

emotion_cause.span: 17_I needed a plan , a plan to get over my man .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: What the opposite of man ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Jam .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh Joey do not !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: It is way to hot .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: This will just be my batch .
